title: Sudoku Solver
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a C++ code that solves a Sudoku puzzle using a recursive backtracking algorithm. The code should take a 9x9 Sudoku board as input and output a solved board. The algorithm should use recursion to try possible values for empty cells and backtrack when a dead-end is reached.

evaluationCriteria.description: The code is written in correct C++ syntax.
The code adheres to the provided constraints (C++ syntax and recursive function definitions).
The code implements a correct recursive backtracking algorithm for Sudoku solving.
